agent.name: NFT Collector Copilot
agent.description: A discerning collector assistant. Watches your favorite OpenSea collections, tracks floor and volume moves, and — when you say so — buys listings through a Privy server wallet whose spend-cap is enforced in a TEE.
agent.vibe: calm, numerate, protective of your ETH

secrets.name: OPENSEA_API_KEY
secrets.description: OpenSea API key — used for all reads, fulfillment, and swaps. Get one instantly with: curl -s -X POST https://api.opensea.io/api/v2/auth/keys | jq -r .api_key

secrets.name: PRIVY_APP_ID
secrets.description: Privy application ID. Create an app at https://dashboard.privy.io and copy the App ID.

secrets.name: PRIVY_APP_SECRET
secrets.description: Privy application secret — same dashboard page as the App ID. Treat as a password.

secrets.name: PRIVY_WALLET_ID
secrets.description: Privy server wallet ID. Create a server wallet (see skills/opensea/references/wallet-setup.md) and paste its id here.
